case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. SAFETY NATIONAL CASUALTY CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SAFETY NATIONAL CASUALTY CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE OF COPIES OF MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT VIA CITY ATTORNEY OFFICE FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST HELENA BAIL BONDS SERVED JUN-23-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
OPPOSITION TO RPI SAFETY NATIONAL'S MOTION TO RECALL & SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-05-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

NOTICE OF MOTION TO RECALL AND SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST HELENA BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR JUN-21-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFETY NATIONAL CASUALTY CORPORATION $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,180.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PROOF OF SERVICE OF COPIES OF MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT VIA DISTRICT ATTORNEY - HALL OF JUSTICE FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST HELENA BAIL BONDS SERVED JUN-23-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE: MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST HELENA BAIL BONDS
NOTICE OF MOTION TO RECALL AND SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST HELENA BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR JUL-05-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, SURETY AND REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SAFETY NATIONAL CASUALTY CORPORATION'S MOTION TO RECALL AND SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. THE PROOF OF SERVICE FAILS TO STATE WHEN THE PARTY WAS SERVED OR WHAT EXACT METHOD OF SERVICE WAS USED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: REAL PARTY IN INTEREST HELENA BAIL BONDS' MOTION TO RECALL AND SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER CAROL KAREN CSR #8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-21-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Recall And Set Aside Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: SURETY AND REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SAFETY NATIONAL CASUALTY CORPORATION'S Motion To Recall And Set Aside Summary Judgment.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied for invalid Proof of Service. The proof of service fails to state when the party was served or what exact method of service was used. (301/EHG/ju) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489

Notice Of Motion To Recall And Set Aside Summary Judgment

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- SUSAN DAY, APPEARING FOR REAL PARTY IN INTEREST HELENA BAIL BONDS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - REAL PARTY IN INTEREST HELENA BAIL BONDS Notice Of Motion To Recall And Set Aside Summary Judgment IS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. =(301/PJB) Judge Peter J. Busch, Reporter Carol Karen CSR # 8189.
